+ back to AI Banner Creator Workflow
AI Banner Creator Workflow

Step 05 — Copy Routes

The GPT gives you 3 copy options aligned to the chosen angle, each with a headline and one-line subline. Each option follows the rules: clear, human, believable, no unearned hype, copy that makes sense read aloud. For more variety, upload the Static Ad Copy Framework (download below) and ask the GPT to use it to generate more routes. Pick one option and move on, or iterate for more.

+ static ad copy framework
